data.title: Abu Dhabi Autonomous Summit part of Abu Dhabi Autonomous Week 2025 to shape smart mobility future.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, UAE, on September 24, 2025, the Smart and Autonomous Systems Council (SASC) will host the Abu Dhabi Autonomous Summit during the Abu Dhabi Autonomous Week (ADAW). This summit aims to bring together international leaders to shape the future of smart and autonomous mobility.

data.title: Bitcoin and altcoins struggle to reach record levels like gold and stocks due to stablecoin liquidity issues on exchanges.
data.description: This month, Bitcoin and alternative cryptocurrencies did not reach record highs alongside gold and stocks, due in part to inadequate stablecoin availability on digital currency platforms.

data.title: SHIB price falls 2% with RSI at 38.89 and MACD bearish. Key support crucial for SHIB bounce back.

The cryptocurrency's ability to bounce back largely depends on maintaining key support levels.

data.title: SUI price drops 23% to $3.23 despite a golden cross formation, indicating mixed signals for traders.
data.description: The stock of SUI is currently trading at $3.23, experiencing a significant 23% drop recently. Interestingly, despite this decline, the stock has exhibited a bullish golden cross pattern. However, traders analyzing the technical aspects are receiving conflicting signals about the stock's future performance.

data.title: One trader transformed $125K into $43M on Ether, using leverage, cashing out $6.86M. Insights for traders.
data.description: A trader successfully turned an initial investment of $125,000 into an impressive $43 million by leveraging on the Hyperliquid platform in Ethereum. Subsequently, the trader made a significant cashout of $6.86 million. This remarkable feat offers valuable insights for other traders to glean from.

data.title: Worldcoin is trading at $1.29 (-2.27%) with RSI at 46.49. Despite testing key supports, it holds a bullish long-term trend.
data.description: The stock WLD is currently priced at $1.29, showing a daily decline of 2.27%. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 46.49, indicating a neutral position. WLD is currently testing important support levels, although it continues to follow a positive long-term trend despite recent fluctuations.

data.title: Optimism (OP) price plummets to $0.67 as 116M tokens unlocked, triggering 11.82% weekly drop. Technicals indicate oversold.
data.description: Currently, the value of OP stands at $0.67, reflecting a decrease of 4.21% over the past 24 hours. This drop was primarily driven by a significant token unlock that occurred recently, leading to a notable 11.82% decrease in value over the week. Technical indicators are indicating that the market for OP is oversold at the moment.

data.title: Global economic freedom has decreased for the fourth consecutive year according to the Fraser Institute report.
data.description: According to the latest Economic Freedom of the World report released by the Fraser Institute today in Toronto on September 25, 2025, global economic freedom has decreased for the fourth consecutive year. The report highlights that after reaching its peak in 2019, economic freedom has been on a downward trend, with this year marking the continuous decline. This concerning trend underscores a notable shift in policy dynamics, affecting various economies worldwide.

data.title: USA Buyer Program for IGJS Jaipur Show 2026 appoints Olga Gonzalez as USA Coordinator, offering stipends, factory tours, and support for U.S. participants.
data.description: USA Coordinator Olga Gonzalez is providing U.S. retailers, manufacturers, and designers with exclusive access to India's booming gem and jewelry industry. This opportunity includes stipends, factory tours, and personalized support. The initiative was launched in New York on September 25, 2025. This program offers a unique chance to tap into India's flourishing sector and create fruitful partnerships.

data.title: AXIL Brands introduces X30i Filtered Earplug Bundle Pack on Costco.com, 2nd product launch on the platform.
data.description: The X30i earplugs mark the company's second product release on the Costco platform.
